html:
Exclusive to:
The Accursed Trinket is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in the The Curse of Moon Quay update.

Accursed Trinkets are received automatically any time a Powder Monkey is killed, unless the player is too far away. They cannot be dropped or transferred to any other storage container without being returned immediately back to the inventory, effectively reducing the player by one inventory slot.

When the player dies, the Accursed Trinkets will drop on the ground and will disappear if left on the ground for 4 minutes (half of in-game day).

Curse

As more trinkets are obtained the player starts to slowly resemble a monkey and at ten trinkets the user fully transforms into Wonkey. In order to get rid of Accursed Trinkets the player can give Bananas to the Queen of Moon Quay. For every banana four trinkets will be taken. Once transformed the player needs to lose all the trinkets in order to transform back to their original character.

Count Effect
1 Monkey feet
3 Monkey hands
6 Monkey tail
10 Character turns into Wonkey

Tips

  • It's possible to get rid of trinkets by dying next to Lureplant. They will be destroyed after some time within it.
  • Another way to get rid of them would be dying in the caves and pushing every trinket off the edge of the map while in ghost form.

Gallery

  • dropped
  • dropped
  • dropped
  • dropped
  • dropped
  • Concept art of the Accursed Trinket shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Accursed Trinket shown in Rhymes With Play stream.

“It seems harmless.”
–Wilson
“Is that a real tooth on it? Haha, cool.”
–Willow
“Gives Wolfgang the heebiddy jeebies.”
–Wolfgang
“It has an aura of malevolence... and monkeyness.”
–Wendy
“GET IT AWAY FROM MEEEE”
–WX-78
“Primitive jewelry.”
–Wickerbottom
“I know a curse when I see it.”
–Woodie
“Disgusting!”
–Maxwell
“Plunder!”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe it's a monkey friendship bracelet?”
–Webber
“It gives me a strange, bad feeling...”
–Warly
“Ooooh, pretty danglies”
–Wormwood
“Charm bracelets were never really my thing.”
–Winona
“Oh me oh my, I couldn't leave it if I tried!”
–Wortox
“Oooooh, pretty!”
–Wurt
“This is definitely going in my collection.”
–Walter
“That is one trinket I'd rather not have cluttering my pockets.”
–Wanda

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
The '''Accursed Trinket''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in the ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. 

Accursed Trinkets are received automatically any time a [[Powder Monkey]] is killed, unless the player is too far away. They cannot be dropped or transferred to any other storage container without being returned immediately back to the inventory, effectively reducing the player by one inventory slot.

When the player dies, the Accursed Trinkets will drop on the ground and will disappear if left on the ground for 4 minutes (half of in-game day).
{{clear}}

== {{pic|32|Accursed Trinket}} Curse ==
As more trinkets are obtained the player starts to slowly resemble a monkey and at ten trinkets the user fully transforms into [[Wonkey]]. In order to get rid of Accursed Trinkets the player can give [[Banana|Bananas]] to the [[Queen of Moon Quay]]. For every banana four trinkets will be taken. Once transformed the player needs to lose all the trinkets in order to transform back to their original character.

== {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
*It's possible to get rid of trinkets by dying next to [[Lureplant]]. They will be destroyed after some time within it.
*Another way to get rid of them would be dying in the caves and pushing every trinket off the edge of the map while in ghost form.
